name: standing_start_pitch
description: Long-hold baseline for the OLD stopwatch-full-360-rotation cross-check (re-confirms tau_pitch ~0.146s / standing-start 360 in 5.44s @ 68 deg/s). Do NOT run this through track_landmark.py -- a tracked landmark exits frame well before this 8s hold completes. For a continuous spin-up omega(t) curve, use pitch_spool_up.json instead.
